title: pavonia serrata
intro: Pavonia serrata, also known as Rock Rose or Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Pavonia serrata has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
